codeReview.summary: Clean, complete rename of the shaping library to fonts across 23 files. The diff is perfectly symmetric (177 additions, 177 deletions), indicating a pure rename with zero behavioral changes. All functional references — extern crate declarations, use statements, Cargo.toml dependencies, build.rs paths/variable names/extern names/rerun-if-changed directives — have been updated from shaping to fonts. Cargo.lock files in both libraries/fonts/ and test/ correctly reflect the new package name. Remaining occurrences of 'shaping' in .rs files are exclusively in comments referring to the concept of text shaping (the activity), not to the library name, which is semantically correct. Zero stale references to 'libraries/shaping' paths, 'extern crate shaping', or 'use shaping::' remain in the codebase. The .factory/services.yaml and .factory/library/environment.md were also updated to reflect the new directory name. Build succeeded and all 1462 tests passed per the handoff verification.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The test file system/test/tests/shaping.rs was not renamed to fonts.rs during the rename. The feature description explicitly says this is optional ('The test file name can optionally be renamed to fonts.rs but this is not required'), so this is not a blocking issue. However, the file's module doc comment still says '//! Tests for the shaping library' which could cause confusion for future agents. A minor naming consistency gap.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: system/test/tests/shaping.rs:1 still reads '//! Tests for the shaping library (HarfRust integration).' — the library is now called 'fonts'.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The services.yaml command was renamed from test_shaping to test_fonts, which is correct. No gaps here.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/services.yaml diff shows test_shaping → test_fonts with updated path.

summary: Pass. The rename from shaping to fonts is complete and correct across all 23 files. All functional references (imports, extern crate, Cargo.toml deps, build.rs paths) are updated. Only semantic comments about the activity of 'text shaping' remain, which is correct. Build and all 1462 tests pass. The worker followed the refactor-worker skill procedure correctly.
